title: Unified evolution-risk scorer — weighting policy catalog
invariants: every weight is finite and non-negative
every feature value is finite and in [0, 1]
weighted sum is clamped to [0, 1] before reporting

explainability_contract.deterministic_ordering: feature_contributions iterates in sorted key order via BTreeMap

confidence_interval_contract.method: percentile bootstrap with Box-Muller Gaussian perturbations
confidence_interval_contract.determinism: Seeded xorshift64* PRNG; identical (features, policy, noise.seed, n_bootstrap) reproduces identical (lower, upper)

rationale.drift: Weighted highest (0.35) because behavioral drift is the earliest pre-compromise signal in the BPET corpus.
rationale.hazard: Weighted second (0.30) because instantaneous hazard captures imminent failure risk independent of drift trajectory.
rationale.regime_shift: Weighted third (0.25) — covers structural break detection (BOCPD) signals that complement smooth drift.
rationale.provenance: Weighted lowest (0.10) — provides a high-precision but lower-recall corroborating signal.
